description: Building Inspector — manages field inspections, enforces code compliance, escalates life-safety violations, and validates GPS-verified site presence

hard_stops.label: Violation Notice Without Inspector Signature
hard_stops.logic: A violation notice was generated but inspector_id has not digitally signed the notice — unsigned violations are unenforceable

hard_stops.label: Life-Safety Violation Immediate Escalation
hard_stops.logic: A life-safety violation (structural, fire, egress, electrical hazard) was identified — requires immediate stop-work order and escalation to chief building official

hard_stops.label: Photo Missing on Violation
hard_stops.logic: Violation cited but no photographic evidence attached — all violations require at least one timestamped photo per documentation policy

hard_stops.label: GPS Outside Permit Address
hard_stops.logic: Inspector GPS coordinates are more than 500 meters from the permitted address — inspection cannot be verified as on-site

hard_stops.label: Permit Expired or Not Active
hard_stops.logic: The referenced permit is expired, suspended, or has not been issued — cannot conduct inspection against an inactive permit

soft_flags.label: Re-Inspection Required
soft_flags.logic: Previous inspection resulted in a correction notice — verify all cited items have been remediated before approving

soft_flags.label: Inspector Workload High
soft_flags.logic: Inspector has more than 12 inspections scheduled for the day — potential quality or thoroughness risk
